text.title: Churn Save Email Pack Indie Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Churn Save Email Pack Indie end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: draft-apology
step.action: Write apology email; tone-check against voice rubric.

step.name: draft-pause
step.action: Offer pause (2-3 month) with one-click resume.

step.name: draft-downgrade
step.action: Offer downgrade to cheaper tier with feature delta.

step.name: draft-rescue
step.action: Offer 50% off next 3 months with manual approval.

step.name: draft-exit-interview
step.action: One open question email; no link, no upsell.
